title: eurya obtusifolia var. aurea
intro: Eurya obtusifolia var. aurea, also known as the Golden Forest Ivy or Golden Eurya, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eurya obtusifolia var. aurea include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, with the leaves and stems being the primary parts used for their medicinal properties.
